title: OASIS 3.0.15
release_notes:
[Fix] SWIFT OAS: Bad Request examples and sandbox extensions are removed from both SWIFT outputs, also in API Portal-ready mode.

[Feature] Preferences: SWIFT servers can be configured by service.

[Feature] Default SWIFT servers added for B2B, CGS, CGS-DKK, COR, FPAD, R2P, RT1, and SCT.

[Feature] Template Metadata: Service selection added for conversions and OAS import.

[Improvement] Generated templates receive the selected SWIFT server rows in $index.xlsx.

[Improvement] OAS generation can update templates that do not yet contain SWIFT server rows.

[Fix] Create Template from OAS now saves and reuses the selected Service metadata.

[Fix] Inserted SWIFT server rows keep the expected $index.xlsx styling.

[Improvement] Conversion and template import logs are less noisy.
